commit.message:
Add summary line at end of test runs (#91)

* Add summary line at end of test runs

Replace the verbose 'Results: X passed, Y failed, Z errors, N total' line
with a concise, pytest-style summary:

- Clean runs: '42 passed in 1.8s'
- Runs with issues: '9 passed, 2 failed, 3 blocked (runner limitation) in 1.8s'

Changes:
- Executor.PrintResults now accepts optional totalMs parameter
- 'errors' renamed to 'blocked (runner limitation)' for clarity
- Elapsed time tracked in Pipeline.cs via Stopwatch around RunTests()
- Four new unit tests in RunnerErrorClassificationTests.cs covering all cases
- Two new pipeline integration tests in PipelineTests.cs

Closes #71

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address review: nullable totalMs, split error types, fix SourceFileMapper test flakiness

- Change PrintResults signature to long? totalMs = null so 0ms runs still
  show timing when explicitly provided vs truly omitted
  so the summary accurately labels each category
- Only show non-zero counts in summary (no '0 failed, 0 blocked' noise)
- Fix SourceFileMapperTests race condition: add [Collection("Pipeline")] to
  SourceFileMapperTests and ClassToObjectMappingTests to prevent parallel
  execution corrupting the static SourceFileMapper state
- Update test assertions to match new summary format

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update CHANGELOG for summary line feature (#71)

* Fix member template variadic pack expansion in constructor calls

- Add variadic pack parameter handling to instantiate_member_function_template_core
  to expand Args... parameters into individual args_0, args_1, etc. parameters
- Detect variadic template parameters by checking if the parameter type name
  matches a variadic template parameter (handles cases where is_parameter_pack
  flag isn't set)
- Set up pack_param_info_ for body parsing to enable pack expansion
- Add pack expansion support in constructor argument parsing
  (parse_expression followed by ...) to expand args... into individual args
- Restore pack_param_info_ at function end to avoid polluting outer context

This enables member function templates with variadic parameters like:
  template <typename... Args>
  void emplace(Args&&... args) { value = T(args...); }
to be properly instantiated and have their bodies parsed correctly.

commit.message:
feat: Authentication system optimization with token management

- Add auth.rs module for secure token management with system keyring storage
- Implement TokenData struct with automatic expiry detection (5-minute buffer)
- Add token refresh mechanism with automatic re-authentication fallback
- Support interactive password input when credentials are missing
- Enhance client.rs with token refresh and 401 error handling
- Integrate auth flow in main.rs with complete initialization pipeline
- Add keyring dependency for cross-platform secure storage (Linux/macOS/Windows)
- Update all documentation (README, CHANGELOG, docs/)
- API compatibility fix: handle optional refresh_token field from API responses

Features:
- First run: authenticate with credentials, save token to system keyring
- Subsequent runs: automatically load token from keyring
- Token expiry: automatic detection with 5-minute buffer
- Token refresh: automatic refresh on expiry, fallback to re-authentication
- Cross-platform: Linux Secret Service, macOS Keychain, Windows Credential Manager

Verified:
- All cargo checks passed (fmt, clippy -D warnings)
- Release build successful (4.9 MB binary)
- Actual runtime test passed: token saved, articles synced

commit.message:
Auto-focus terminal when opening tool window from menu

Focus the TerminalControl after frame.Show() by yielding to a
background thread first, then switching back to the UI thread.
This lets VS finish its frame activation sequence before we set
focus on the native terminal HWND. Without the yield, VS steals
focus back during its own activation handling.

Pattern taken from VS's own TerminalWindowBase.OnActiveFrameChanged.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Notable upstream changes in 10.1.1–10.1.7:
- Improved error handling in DotnetPublisher (better build error extraction)

- IsTerminal changed to Maybe<bool> (inferred from OutputType)

* fix: detect empty GitHub releases and propagate exit code on failure

When all package builds fail, the deployer now:
- Deletes the empty release instead of leaving it on GitHub
- Cleans up the release if an exception occurs during upload
- Returns a non-zero exit code so CI pipelines fail correctly

The exit code bug was caused by SetAction(Func<ParseResult, Task>) which
ignores Environment.ExitCode. Now uses a closure variable returned from Main.

Fix Escape key stealing focus from embedded terminal

VS maps Escape to 'deactivate tool window', causing focus to jump to
the editor when pressing Escape in the terminal. Fix by intercepting
WM_KEYDOWN(VK_ESCAPE) in PreProcessMessage and forwarding the Kitty
keyboard protocol escape sequence to ConPTY, matching VS's own
TerminalWindowBase.EscKeyCode pattern exactly.

which upserts by (statistic_id, start) timestamp.

Result: all days in lookback window always get imported
